# 1/3-2/3 Conjecture — Roadmap

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-05-15 09:00 BST (morning sweep). Manual edits will be overwritten on next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

## Headline — milestone 1 pivoted to the BK/Cheeger route; one constants-audit residual (Hypothesis A) remains

The F-series (F19→F24) has resolved the part-(iii) attack on milestone 1 (the *numerical* width-3 1/3-2/3 conclusion) **decisively** — and the resolution is a strategic pivot, not a closure:

- The **F10 cohomological core (parts i–ii)** is **UNCONDITIONAL** (F17 proved (UCC.1); F18 proved (UCC.2)). `Hyp(n)` for all *n*, H-Cox + sgn, ω_bal existence/uniqueness/pairing — done.
- F19→F23 pursued part (iii) — the numerical [3/11, 8/11] / [1/3, 2/3] conclusion — through "the canonical chamber-Morse critical cell c*_n." F19 discharged (ICOP-step)'s probabilistic content (symmetric-pair lemma); F20 broke the ι-tower model; F21 re-founded the induction on F17's `M_rel^eq` (Prop F21.1); F22-HPC S1 confirmed (CM-rel) at n=3,4,5; **F22-HPC S2 walled** — the genuine c*_{n+1} is a descent, HPC-class and not canonically pinned (4 S_4-orbits at n=3→4); **F23 resolved the meta-question positively** — c*_n IS canonically well-defined (Rule B = "descent-reachable ∧ chamber-Morse critical" + min-|L|-profile), but the rule is HPC-per-n, not closed-form; **F24 settled the part-(iii) fork: pivot to the BK/Cheeger-expansion mechanism** (the "Route B" decisively forced — Route A is HPC + an evidence-disfavoured n-uniform-pattern endgame).
- **The BK/Cheeger route** (in-tree paper `main.tex` + Steps 1–8) is gap-free *except* for **Hypothesis A** — one *n*-independent arithmetic inequality in named constants; F24 even collapsed the ∃T quantifier (optimal T = T_0 absolute), reducing Hyp A to a single inequality in γ alone. **F25 (mg-c6f2)** is the audit — paper-and-pencil, polecat-attackable, no HPC, no Lean. **If F25 GREENs, width-3 1/3-2/3 is proven (unconditional) and milestone 1 part (iii) is DONE.**

`width3_one_third_two_thirds` is hypothesis-free on `origin/main` since 2026-05-05. Trust surface: **4 axioms** (case3 + Brightwell + Stanley-temp + cellMass_AD-temp) + 5 `native_decide`. **Unchanged** across the whole F11→F25 arc — no new axioms, no Lean changes anywhere in the program.

## Now (in flight)

Subtasks (per F24 §4): (1) discharge ∃T → pin T_0 absolute; (2) extract explicit bounds for c_5*, K_0(γ,w), c_6, C_7, c_4/C_4; (3) check satisfiability over γ ∈ (0, 0.057). Three outcomes: GREEN-hyp-A-proven (milestone 1 (iii) DONE), AMBER-bottleneck-located (one un-optimised lemma named → F26), RED-hyp-A-false (Daniel-level finding).

## Trajectory
- **1/3-2/3 (overnight, 2026-05-14 PM → 05-15 AM):** decisive convergence + a clean strategic pivot. - *Trajectory:* the union_closed product line is **fully native and viable** — UC1→UC6 built a complete native framework with the residual sharpened each step; UC7 attempts the signing. All deliverables on `union_closed/main` (UC1–UC6 inclusive; UC7 will land there next).
